description_long: This is a young adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a geometric logo on the chest and sleeves. The hoodie displays a gradient pattern, paired with fitted pants and lace-up sneakers. The figure has short, styled hair and wears large, round glasses, giving a modern, trendy appearance. His hands are relaxed and slightly apart from his body, and his posture is upright and neutral. The clothing appears to be made from typical fabric materials, while the shoes have a rubber sole. The overall look is that of a contemporary city pedestrian, suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: A casually dressed young adult male with a hoodie, fitted pants, sneakers, and glasses, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the geometric logo on the hoodie, glasses, and the relaxed, upright stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the hood, and the logo on the sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded sweatshirt and the figure's hair, with both arms visible at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, sleeve logo, and sneaker details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, and lace-up sneakers
